title: Another death in a Sri Lankan fuel queue
body_lines: COLOMBO (News 1st); A man who was waiting in line at the Ceypetco Filling station in Batagoda, Horana died this morning.
Police said that a 59-year-old man had died inside a truck while waiting in line for fuel.
